:root { color-scheme: light; --bg: #f5f7fb; --panel: #ffffff; --text: #111827; --muted: #6b7280; --border: #e5e7eb; --accent: #2563eb; --accent-soft: #dbeafe; --shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); } body { margin: 0; min-height: 100vh; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #e0f2fe 0%, transparent 35%), linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #eef2ff 100%); color: var(--text); } body.dark { color-scheme: dark; --bg: #0f172a; --panel: #111827; --text: #f8fafc; --muted: #a5b4fc; --border: #1f2937; --accent: #818cf8; --accent-soft: rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.16); --shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); background: radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18) 0%, transparent 28%), linear-gradient(180deg, #111827 0%, #0b1224 100%); } .dashboard-shell { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 32px 24px 48px; } .dashboard-header { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; } .eyebrow { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--accent); margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 0.85rem; } h1 { margin: 0; font-size: clamp(2rem, 2.8vw, 3rem); line-height: 1.05; } .subtitle { margin: 12px 0 0; color: var(--muted); max-width: 640px; font-size: 1rem; } .theme-toggle { padding: 12px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--panel); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .overview-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin: 32px 0; } .stat-card, .highlight-card { background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .stat-label { display: block; font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 14px; } .stat-card strong { font-size: 2.4rem; display: block; line-height: 1; } .highlight-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text); } .control-panel { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 24px; } .search-box { flex: 1 1 320px; } .search-box label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--muted); } .search-box input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px 18px; background: var(--panel); color: var(--text); font-size: 1rem; } .filter-buttons { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; } .filter-btn { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 16px; background: var(--panel); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; } .filter-btn.active, .filter-btn:hover { background: var(--accent-soft); border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .tips-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 22px; } .tip-card { background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 28px; padding: 28px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .tip-card h2 { margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 1.2rem; } .tip-card p { margin: 0 0 16px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; } .tip-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; } .tip-tag { font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--accent-soft); color: var(--accent); } .tip-priority { margin-left: auto; color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; } @media (max-width: 640px) { .dashboard-shell { padding: 24px 16px 36px; } .overview-grid { margin: 24px 0; } }
